mapper.select:
SELECT S.*, D2.DNAME AS DNAME2, D1.DNAME AS DNAME3, D3.DNAME AS SUB_DNAME3, P.NAME AS PROF_NAME FROM STU S LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D3 ON S.DEPTNO2 = D3.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN PROFESSOR P ON S.PROFNO = P.PROFNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D1 ON S.DEPTNO1 = D1.DEPTNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D2 ON D1.PART = D2.DEPTNO WHERE 1=1
AND S.GRADE = #{grade};
AND S.DEPTNO1 = #{deptNo};
ORDER BY NAME
ORDER BY D1.DNAME
ORDER BY GRADE
ORDER BY GRADE
SELECT * FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE BUILD IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STU(STUNO, NAME, GRADE, DEPTNO1, PROFNO) VALUES(#{stuNo},#{stuName},#{grade},#{deptNo},#{profNo})
INSERT INTO PROFESSOR(PROFNO, NAME, POSITION, PAY, DEPTNO) VALUES(#{profNo},#{profName},#{position},#{pay},#{deptNo})
mapper.select: SELECT S.*, D2.DNAME AS DNAME2, D1.DNAME AS DNAME3, D3.DNAME AS SUB_DNAME3, P.NAME AS PROF_NAME FROM STU S LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D3 ON S.DEPTNO2 = D3.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN PROFESSOR P ON S.PROFNO = P.PROFNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D1 ON S.DEPTNO1 = D1.DEPTNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D2 ON D1.PART = D2.DEPTNO WHERE STUNO = #{stuNo}
SELECT P.*, D2.DNAME AS DNAME2, D1.DNAME AS DNAME3 FROM PROFESSOR P INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D1 ON P.DEPTNO = D1.DEPTNO INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D2 ON D1.PART = D2.DEPTNO WHERE PROFNO = #{profNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE STU SET NAME = #{stuName}, GRADE = #{grade}, DEPTNO1 = #{deptNo1}, PROFNO = #{profNo} WHERE STUNO = #{stuNo}
